name: Lied Recreation Center
description: Lied Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarinda, IA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, food, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Stargazing Park
description: Come play pickleball at Stargazing Park in Clarinda, IA! There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water and lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
